data.title: Establish issue-first planning workflow for larger work
data.description:
## Summary

Document and validate a repeatable workflow where larger work starts as a GitHub issue and then flows into local `gptodo` tasks, worktrees, implementation, and completion updates.

## Context

The first autonomous run surfaced the need for cleaner issue/task/worktree boundaries before committing mixed workspace changes directly on `master`.

## Acceptance Criteria

* the workflow is documented in `knowledge/`
* it defines what counts as larger work vs one-shot local work
* it includes a real end-to-end example from issue creation through local execution and completion
* the guidance fits current `gptodo` metadata and queue conventions
